126.reason: [This shifts array elements left but doesn't properly handle string termination or duplicate removal logic, leading to undefined behavior and incorrect counts]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [This shifts array elements left but does not properly handle the loop index `h` and may cause out-of-bound reads/writes when `r == n-1` because `ci[r+1]` is `ci[n]`, which is beyond valid range. Also, modifying the array during iteration leads to logic errors in duplicate removal.]
